title: 101 Meade Street Restaurant voted the best restaurant in George 3 years in a row!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - A true George establishment...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - A true George establishment that has been entertaining guests for over a decade, 101 Meade remains the flagship restaurant of the Wild Route Restaurant Group. The passionate brother duo, Jeremy and Ben Gibbs, continue to bring their culinary flair to George.


> 101 Meade remains inspired by the natural beauty and bounty of the Garden Route and all it has to offer.


The restaurant boasts a South African-influenced menu, changing with the seasons, showcasing our local produce and quality.

101 Meade welcomes both local and international guests with warm South African hospitality, a commitment to deliver exceptional service, and a passion to deliver a culinary experience to excite the palate.

Community-proudInterwoven in the George community, supporting several charity initiatives, 101 remains truly humbled and appreciative of the wonderful community it is part of. The brothers, with the help of their group executive chef, Dylan Heydra, thrive on passing down knowledge and the development of the next generation - young aspiring chefs and restaurant managers within our community.

"There is nothing more satisfying than nurturing young talent and watching them succeed," is the ethos that runs throughout the group.


> 101 will be hosting a Jazz & Wine event on 24 October, in conjunction with Empower The People, an NPO, to help raise funds for their continued upliftment programmes in our communities.


Relax and enjoy As you enter the restaurant, you feel the warmth from the fireplaces, and experience the beautiful decor and comfortable seating that provides different areas to relax and enjoy.

A definite breakfast and lunch buzz is becoming the norm as the restaurant grows into one of George's most popular meeting spots.

They also have a stunning private room used for all different types of corporate events and private celebrations.

When night falls, the gin trolley rolls, and the sound of chatter and laughter fills the restaurant as the open-plan kitchen delivers another show.

New addition The Wild Route Restaurant Group welcomes its newest addition, Cula, located at the new Outeniqua Lifestyle Centre. Inspired by Ben and Jeremy's love of Oriental cuisine, Cula showcases all the unami flavours from across Asia.

Whether you desire sushi or wok fried noodles, Korean fried chicken or grilled meats, or specialty created cocktails in an extremely stylishly designed restaurant, it is a must-try for everyone living in George and every visitor to the beautiful town.

101 Meade expresses their gratitude for all the wonderful and continued support they have received since their opening 11 years ago.

"Winning three categories in the Best of George Readers' Choice Awards is humbling and extremely rewarding. A big thank you to the entire team who keep pushing forward to make this possible!"

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
